data.title: Specialty Building Products buying OrePac Building Products, enhancing portfolio and presence. OrePac to keep brand, locations, team.
data.description: The recent acquisition by SBP marks a significant step in the company's strategy to broaden its product offerings and reach new geographic markets. The leading regional distributor, OrePac, will continue to operate under its current brand name, retain its existing geographic locations, leadership team, and employees. The deal, finalized on September 19, 2025, reflects SBP's commitment to expanding its presence in the market. This move is expected to enhance SBP's portfolio and strengthen its position in the industry.

data.title: Myriad Systems helps private practices with Good Faith Estimates under No Surprises Act; focus on education and solutions.
data.description: A company based in White Plains, New York, called Myriad Systems is actively engaged in assisting private practices by offering education and practical solutions related to Good Faith Estimates. They aim to inform and support private practices in understanding the requirements associated with Good Faith Estimates.

data.title: New Keytruda shot approved by FDA for cancer; Merck's injection is faster, raising costs by billions and hindering competition.
data.description: Merck has announced the introduction of an injectable version of its popular infusion Keytruda, which will provide a faster and more convenient treatment option. However, this may hinder the uptake of more cost-effective alternatives, potentially leading to a significant increase in healthcare costs amounting to billions of dollars.
Trump administration in talks to re-establish military presence in afghanistan, according to sources - WSJ.

data.title: Gala Games offers limited-time NFT sale for TownStar, with exclusive discounts for Chilean and Mexican National Holidays. Boost gameplay with rare and epic items.
data.description: Gala Games is honoring the National Holidays of Chile and Mexico by offering exclusive discounts on NFTs for their game TownStar. During this sale, players will have the opportunity to purchase rare and epic in-game items at reduced prices. These special discounts aim to enhance the gameplay experience for users, with a focus on celebrating the cultures of Chile and Mexico.

data.title: President Trump celebrates Fed rate cut, but inflation remains high. Fed cuts benchmark rate to 4.00%-4.25%. Inflation projected to stay above 2% until 2027. Fed predicts more rate cuts in 2025, 2026, and 2027 despite rising inflation. Fed Chair Powell downplays tariff risks.
data.description: President Donald Trump celebrated a win over the Federal Reserve as they lowered the benchmark interest rate by 25 basis points to 4.00%-4.25%. Despite pressure, the Fed seems focused on the labor market over inflation with projections showing inflation above 2% until 2027. The updated "dot plot" reveals two rate cuts in 2025, bringing the year-end rate to 3.6%, with one cut expected in both 2026 and 2027. Inflation forecasts rise, with core PCE inflation at 3.0% in 2025, 2.6% in 2026, and reaching 2.1% in 2027. Fed Chair Jerome Powell also played down tariff risks.

data.title: Gensler reaffirms crypto stance as SEC shifts. Former and current chairs discuss US President's key policies in media.
data.description: This week, the former chair of the SEC and the current head, Paul Atkins, both appeared in the media to discuss important policies put forward by US President Donald Trump.
US Senate Confirms Former Trump National Security Adviser Waltz To Be Ambassador To The UN

data.title: InventHelp inventor from Santa Clarita, Calif., develops E O E recycle receptacle for contact lenses to reduce pollution.
data.description: In Pittsburgh on September 19, 2025, an inventor from Santa Clarita, California shared the inspiration behind creating the E O E (EYES ON THE ENVIRONMENT) system. The inventor believed there was a need for a convenient method to recycle contact lenses and their packaging to combat pollution and contribute positively to environmental preservation. This innovative solution aims to address the issue by providing a simple and efficient way to dispose of contact lenses, ultimately aiding in environmental protection efforts.

data.title: EcoPro Materials and Green Li-ion partnering for sustainable Li-ion battery supply chain from 2026, S'pore and S.Korea.
data.description: In a move to enhance the sustainable supply chain for lithium-ion batteries, a partnership between Green Li-ion Pte. Ltd. and EcoPro Materials Co., Ltd. has been announced. The collaboration, set to commence in 2026, brings together expertise from Singapore and Pohang, South Korea. Green Li-ion Pte. Ltd., known for its leadership in lithium-ion battery recycling, will join forces with EcoPro Materials Co., Ltd., a company specializing in battery precursor production. This initiative aims to strengthen the supply chain for sustainable Li-ion batteries and promote eco-friendly practices in the industry. The collaboration is scheduled to begin in [insert month and year].

data.title: Gemmy's animated Halloween decor brings chills with walking, talking characters and head popping visuals. Released in Dallas on Sept. 19, 2025.
data.description: Dallas is set to be spooked as Gemmy unveils an electrifying range of animated Halloween decorations on September 19, 2025. These battery-operated indoor decorations feature walking, talking, and head-popping characters that promise to bring chills and thrills to viewers. Get ready for a Halloween experience like never before with this collection.

data.title: AVSI revives poverty graduation program in Uganda with $1.5M donor investment after termination by USAID.
data.description: In early 2025, USAID ceased funding for cost-effective projects aiding impoverished households, causing setbacks. Fortunately, a collaborative initiative involving researchers, philanthropists, and an NGO has successfully revived one of these impactful projects. This effort aims to help extremely poor households break free from poverty once again.

data.title: AVSI-USA launching new website on Sept. 30, 2025 to connect American donors with global communities in need.
data.description: On September 19, 2025, AVSI-USA announced its renewed dedication to linking average American donors with global communities requiring assistance amidst evolving funding conditions. A new website launch is scheduled for September 30, 2025, aimed at encouraging and involving contributors.

data.title: Fed expected to cut rates by at least 25 basis points, Trump hoping for more. Markets at all-time highs. Probabilities: 96.1% for 25-point cut, 3.9% for 50-point cut. Expert predicts potential 50-point cut, the biggest since September 2024. Inflation, unemployment, and consumer spending concerns prominent. Potential for more cuts in October, December. (Word count: 59)
data.description: The Federal Reserve is expected to announce a rate cut at the upcoming Federal Open Market Committee meeting in September, which would be the first cut since December 2024. President Trump has been advocating for a rate cut for months, and it is anticipated to be at least a 25 basis points cut, with some experts suggesting a potential 50 basis points move, the largest since September 2024. The CME FedWatch Tool indicates a 96.1% probability of a 25-basis-point cut and a 3.9% chance of a 50-basis-point cut on Wednesday. Similarly, prediction market Kalshi shows a 94% chance of a 25-point cut and a 5% chance of a larger cut. The decision comes amidst concerns over inflation, unemployment, and consumer spending. The focus will likely turn to the October and December FOMC meetings for potential further actions or the first cut of 2025.
